title: Create Reservation - Happy Path

assertions.step: Search available rooms: Totem Lodge, 3 days (Jun 27-30)
assertions.expected: Room list displays for selected date range
assertions.actual: Inventory search returned 8 available rooms (Queen, King, Double)

assertions.expected: Room marked as selected, highlight shows
assertions.actual: Room 229 selected, blue highlight applied, total shown: $299.00 CAD
All fields filled successfully, no validation errors

assertions.step: Add booking notes: Guest prefers high floor
assertions.expected: Notes accepted, no character validation errors
assertions.actual: Note saved; validation passed (letters, spaces, apostrophe allowed)

assertions.expected: Review page shows all entered data; Confirm button enabled
assertions.actual: Review displayed correctly; Confirm clicked and POST /api/v1/booking returned 200

assertions.step: Verify booking appears on Dashboard + Calendar
assertions.expected: Booking BK_ABC123 visible on Dashboard Check In tab; calendar bar shows Jun 27-30
assertions.actual: Dashboard refreshed; booking BK_ABC123 listed; calendar Week view shows bar in correct cells

notes: File coverage: src/pages/CreateReservation.tsx:45-120. All stepper steps completed successfully. Booking created with correct date range and guest info.
